历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2023 was approximately 3527, moving forward to about 3052 in 2024, and significantly moving back to about 4824 in 2025, with drastic fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4824. The provincial science enrollment plan was 27 in 2023 → 24 in 2024 → 19 in 2025, showing a year-on-year reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 19, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion signal, and competitive pressure remains unrelieved.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 22nd on the main list (sharing the ranking with Shandong University), placing it among the top universities in the country, with sustained strong appeal to candidates. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly related to historical public opinion incidents (the 2019 study partner incident), but it ranks 20th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, and still relatively high application attention, partially offsetting positive and negative effects. Mathematics is rated A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, Control Science and Engineering A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength. Among the enrollment majors, the Electronic Information category corresponds to Control Science and Engineering/Electronic Science and Technology (A-/A), with strong disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the social popularity of Electronic Information/Communication majors is 'highly recommended', Computer majors are 'recommended', and related engineering majors continue to see rising application heat. The total number of candidates in Xinjiang for the 2026 college entrance exam is about 238,000 (a significant increase of about 3 times from approximately 76,500 in 2025). Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 163,000 science candidates, significantly intensifying the competitive environment. Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, an eastern coastal city, which presents a certain geographical distance for Xinjiang candidates, but the appeal of the 985/211 level can partially offset regional concerns.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4824, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 3 times in the total number of Xinjiang candidates leading to intensified competition, and the sustained high popularity of Electronic Information majors, it is expected that the lowest admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move back from 2025. The predicted lowest ranking is about 4904, with a range of 4404–5404.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Electronic Information (Intelligent Engineering New Engineering Experimental Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Science and Technology, Robotics Engineering, Low-Altitude Technology and Engineering)
- Economics (Finance (Digital Finance Direction), Finance (Insurance Technology Direction), International Economics and Trade (Digital Trade Direction))
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Marine Science (Marine Science, Marine Resource Development Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 4404–5404, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Marine Science as the main choice, with Tier 1 Electronic Information and Economics as reach options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 4404), you can prioritize reaching for the flagship Electronic Information major.

历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2023 was approximately 637, slightly shifted back to about 672 in 2024, and significantly shifted back to about 992 in 2025, showing a continuous backward trend over the past three years, with a cumulative shift of about 355 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 992. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 10 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 13 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 13, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 22nd in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (shared with Shandong University), belonging to the top tier of national universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly related to historical public opinion incidents. Ranked 20th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, still attracting considerable attention for applications. Disciplines include Chinese Language and Literature (A), Foreign Languages and Literatures (A), and Marxist Theory (A). Among the enrollment majors, Chinese Language and Literature category corresponds to Chinese Language and Literature (A), and Foreign Languages and Literatures category corresponds to Foreign Languages and Literatures (A), with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the social popularity of Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese category is 'recommended', while Foreign Languages and Literatures category is 'generally wait-and-see'. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Xinjiang is about 238,000 (a significant increase from 2025), with an estimated 75,000 liberal arts candidates based on historical proportions, significantly intensifying the competitive environment. Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, an eastern coastal city, which presents a geographical distance for Xinjiang candidates, but the 985/211 level has strong appeal.

预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 992, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the intensified competition due to a significant increase in the total number of candidates in Xinjiang, and the recommended popularity of Chinese Language and Literature majors, it is expected that the lowest admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift back from 2025. The predicted lowest ranking is about 1012, with a range of 891–1133.
